summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RECRA Solutions Configurator Platform second iteration. Backend APIs fully functional (100% pass rate) with 23 products including 4 new douchelezers. Frontend UI excellent with new zone definition tool, project management features, and proper RECRA light theme branding. Minor UX improvements needed for project deletion and AI recommendations display.

ui_bugs.issue: Delete project button selector not working correctly - button exists but not clickable via test automation

integration_issues.issue: AI recommendations not showing initially until project is saved with products

passed_tests: Backend API /api/ returns welcome message with RECRA branding
Backend API /api/products returns exactly 23 seeded products (4 new douchelezers)
Backend API /api/products/category/douchelezer returns 4 douchelezer products
Backend API /api/products/category/{category} filters correctly for all 8 categories
Backend API POST /api/projects creates new project successfully
Backend API PUT /api/projects/{id} updates project with placed products and zones
Backend API DELETE /api/projects/{id} deletes project successfully
Backend API POST /api/quote/calculate returns accurate CAPEX/OPEX calculations
Backend API POST /api/ai/recommendations returns rule-based recommendations
Backend API POST /api/quote/pdf generates HTML with RECRA branding
Frontend loads with RECRA light theme branding and green accents (#4a9b7f, #2d5a3d)
Inter font family correctly applied throughout UI
Project list dialog opens via 'Projecten' button in header
New project button creates fresh project successfully
Save project button in header saves project to backend
Load existing project from project list works correctly
Wizard navigation between all 4 steps (Project, Terrain, Products, Quote)
Project name input accepts custom project names
Project type selection works for all 4 types (camping, camperplaats, resort, jachthaven)
Number of spots input accepts numeric values
Douchelezer category exists in product filter dropdown
Douchelezer category shows exactly 4 products when selected
Product category filter dropdown filters products correctly for all categories
Product cards display with proper icons, descriptions, and pricing
Zone tool button exists in canvas toolbar
Zone drawing mode activates when zone tool selected (cursor changes to crosshair)
Zone points are added on canvas click during zone drawing
Zone finish button appears and completes zone creation
Zones are displayed on canvas with proper styling
Zones appear in zones list in step 2 after creation
Drag & drop from product cards to canvas places items with snap-to-grid
Real-time quote updates in sidebar (CAPEX: €18,500, OPEX: €450)
AI recommendations panel exists with refresh button
PDF export button exists and is functional
Show/hide coverage toggle functionality works
Canvas grid pattern and styling matches RECRA design
No JavaScript errors detected during testing
